summary: Wild drumming interplay and a killer Day Tripper finish make this show shine, with recording quality presumed good despite no specific source details.
review: The concert is remembered for its extraordinary drum section—Garcia joining Billy and Mickey on percussion—and the crowd becoming a percussive partner. The second set closed with an electrifying cover of Day Tripper that left fans raving. No reviewer comments address sound clarity, so the audio is assumed to be listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: One enthusiastic 5‑star review highlights a standout performance; recording quality is not discussed, leading to uncertainty but no reported problems.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention any audio issues or source type; assumed listenable with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set built around an extended drum jam and concluded with a high‑energy Day Tripper cover, creating a memorable climax.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia spent most of the drum segment onstage, adding wild percussion energy.
band_member_comments.Drums: Billy and Mickey delivered a unique rhythm that turned the crowd into an additional percussion instrument; their interplay was praised as the best drums seen.
